reviews.review_title: One of the GOATs of Physics Sandbox.
reviews.review_description:
I have spent SO many hours on this game. I bought it YEARS ago and it is really fun. There are a lot of weapons, and you can unlock more which is cool, and there are a ton of crazy modifiers and props. You can set up scenarios or just mess around which I think is really cool. For the time I got out of this, this game could be $60.
100/10

I got this game when it was first physics playground, when I got my quest I got sports mode which is the same game but they add so much and then stopped updating the game it became boring over it’s final years and has never been the same, the developers either need to add some new BETTER updates or completely remove the game from metas store

This game, was great, but there is no information on updates and the game will get boring quickly, and sandbox games are irrelevant nowadays. If you genuinely are still interested in this genre even though it is not worth exploring anymore, check out Downshot. Other than that, game had a lot of potential.

reviews.review_title: Good, but I have things I would like
reviews.review_description: This game is pretty good with all the hand physics and stuff. But I wish there was a couple things. Multiplayer would be an obvious one but a suggestion I haven’t ever seen would be to let the player ragdoll, this would be a cool ability that would be really funny. But instead of it not letting you move your arms and head, I think it should just turn your legs into ragdoll and make it so your whole body can move like a ragdoll, still being able to move your arms. But on another note I think you should add better sounds and also make the bullet of the robots move visible so you can slow down time and see them coming towards  you.

reviews.review_title: This game is cool, but add a bit more.

This game is good so here are some things to make it better:
-Better gun physics and more realistic bullets for the Realistic Bullets mod
-Wounds on dummies and robots. After a stab or a shot, there should be a spot of oil where it was.
-More settings. More available graphics settings to minimize lag completely.
-A campaign. A campaign would be awesome.
-Multiplayer. Being able to play this awesome game with friends would be great.
-Maybe a human NPC. I’m guessing you would never add this but if you make the blood on it subtle enough that should be okay.
-For you to listen to my ideas (:
